33607.title: Correcting Endogeneity via Nonparametric Copula Control Functions
33607.zh_title: 通过非参数Copula控制函数纠正内生性
33607.authors: Xixi Hu, Yi Qian, Hui Xie
33607.abstract: We propose a new framework that addresses endogenous regressors using a novel conditional copula endogeneity model to capture the regressor-error dependence unexplained by exogenous regressors. Building on the model, we develop a two-stage nonparametric copula control function approach (2sCOPEnp) for endogeneity correction without relying on instrumental variables. The method relaxes the restrictive assumption of the Gaussian copula regressor-error dependence structure and eliminates the need to model regressors. It unifies and generalizes existing copula-based endogeneity correction methods, while minimizing assumptions about the first-stage auxiliary dependence structures among regressors. Specifically, 2sCOPEnp constructs control functions using nonparametric estimates of the conditional cumulative distribution functions (CDFs) of endogenous regressors given exogenous variables, enhancing the accuracy and robustness of endogeneity correction. Unlike existing copula control function methods, 2sCOPE-np applies to broader dependence structures and can handle discrete endogenous regressors (e.g., binary or count) by leveraging relevant exogenous control variables to smooth discrete conditional CDFs. We demonstrate the robustness and broad applicability of the proposed method compared to existing copula-based endogeneity correction methods. Simulation studies demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms existing methods. We illustrate its usage and advantages in two empirical examples: store sales estimation and return to education.
33607.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个新框架，该框架使用一种新颖的条件Copula内生性模型来解决内生回归变量问题，以捕捉外生回归变量无法解释的回归变量-误差依赖性。基于该模型，我们开发了一种两阶段非参数Copula控制函数方法（2sCOPEnp），用于在不依赖工具变量的情况下进行内生性纠正。该方法放宽了高斯Copula回归变量-误差依赖结构的限制性假设，并消除了对回归变量建模的需要。它统一并推广了现有的基于Copula的内生性纠正方法，同时最小化了关于回归变量之间第一阶段辅助依赖结构的假设。具体而言，2sCOPEnp使用内生回归变量在外生变量条件下的条件累积分布函数的非参数估计来构建控制函数，从而提高了内生性纠正的准确性和稳健性。与现有的Copula控制函数方法不同，2sCOPE-np适用于更广泛的依赖结构，并且可以通过利用相关的外生控制变量来平滑离散的条件累积分布函数，从而处理离散的内生回归变量（例如，二元或计数变量）。我们证明了所提出方法相对于现有基于Copula的内生性纠正方法的稳健性和广泛适用性。模拟研究表明，所提出的方法优于现有方法。我们通过两个实证例子——商店销售额估计和教育回报率——来说明其用法和优势。
33607.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：C0, C01, C10, C14, C51

33606.title: A Bid Strategy for Earlier Payment: Evidence and Implications of Front-End Loading in Procurement
33606.zh_title: 争取提前付款的投标策略：采购中前端加载的证据与启示
33606.abstract: Liquidity management is key in industries with variable cash flows. We study how businesses in the highway construction industry manage cash flow by strategically bidding more on work with an earlier payout—a practice known as front-end loading. We find that small contractors, infrequent bidders, and Disadvantaged Business Enterprises front-end load more intensely, indicating a stronger preference for earlier payment. An equilibrium bidding model highlights a novel pathway through which this preference can affect procurement and its managerial and policy implications.
33606.zh_abstract: 流动性管理在现金流不稳定的行业中至关重要。我们研究了公路建设行业的企业如何通过策略性地对支付时间更早的工程进行更多投标来管理现金流——这种做法被称为前端加载。我们发现，小型承包商、不经常投标的企业以及弱势商业企业进行前端加载的强度更大，表明它们对提前付款有更强的偏好。一个均衡投标模型突显了这种偏好可能影响采购及其管理和政策含义的一条新途径。
33606.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：D44, D82, D86, H57, L74, R42

33605.title: Worker Rights in Collective Bargaining
33605.zh_title: 集体谈判中的工人权利
33605.authors: Benjamin W. Arold, Elliott Ash, W. Bentley MacLeod, Suresh Naidu
33605.abstract: Collective bargaining agreements (CBAs) specify the contractual rights of unionized workers, but their full legal content has not yet been analyzed by economists. This paper develops novel natural language methods to analyze the empirical determinants and economic value of these rights using a new collection of 30,000 CBAs from Canada in the period 1986-2015. We parse legally binding rights (e.g., “workers shall receive...”) and obligations (e.g., “the employer shall pro-vide...”) from contract text, and validate our measures through evaluation of clause pairs and comparison to firm surveys on HR practices. Using time-varying province-level variation in labor income tax rates, we find that higher taxes increase the share of worker-rights clauses while reducing pre-tax wages in unionized firms, consistent with a substitution effect away from taxed wages toward untaxed rights. Further, an exogenous increase in the value of outside options (from a leave-one-out instrument for labor demand) increases the share of worker rights clauses in CBAs. Combining the regression estimates, we infer that a one-standard-deviation increase in worker rights is valued at about 5.7% of wages.
33605.zh_abstract: 集体谈判协议（CBA）规定了工会工人的合同权利，但其完整的法律内容尚未被经济学家分析过。本文利用1986-2015年期间加拿大30,000份CBA的新数据集，开发了新颖的自然语言方法来分析这些权利的实证决定因素和经济价值。我们从合同文本中解析具有法律约束力的权利（例如，“工人应获得……”）和义务（例如，“雇主应提供……”），并通过评估条款对以及与企业人力资源实践调查进行比较来验证我们的衡量指标。利用省级劳动所得税率的时变差异，我们发现较高的税率会增加工人权利条款的份额，同时降低工会化企业的税前工资，这与从被征税的工资向未被征税的权利的替代效应一致。此外，外部选择权价值的外生增加（使用留一法工具变量衡量劳动力需求）会增加CBA中工人权利条款的份额。结合回归估计，我们推断工人权利的一个标准差增加约等于工资的5.7%。

33604.title: Can Treasury Markets Add and Subtract?
33604.zh_title: 国债市场能进行加减运算吗？
33604.authors: Roberto Gomez Cram, Howard Kung, Hanno Lustig
33604.abstract: Treasury markets respond to the news in CBO cost estimates of individual bills about the future funding requirements from pending legislation. Treasury yields increase on days with major deficit-increasing bills, driven by an increase in expected inflation and nominal term premia, along with a decrease in convenience yields. The effects are three times larger for cost revisions for emergency spending proposals, which are unfunded and have a high probability of enactment. Our high-frequency estimates imply that a 1 percentage point one-time increase in deficits/GDP increases the 10-year nominal yield by 0.75 bps. This effect is equivalent to a 6.75 bps increase in yields for a persistent shock to deficits. Investors use these cost releases to learn about the U.S. fiscal stance. In a model with learning, we find that investors attributed a significant portion of the deficit news from cost releases to revisions in policy parameters and that 57% of the total deficit impact was expected to be unbacked.
33604.zh_abstract: 国债市场会对国会预算办公室（CBO）关于待定立法未来融资需求的单项法案成本估算中的新闻做出反应。在赤字增加法案占主导的日子里，国债收益率上升，这是由预期通胀和名义期限溢价的上升以及便利收益的下降共同驱动的。对于紧急支出提案的成本修正，其影响是三倍，这些提案没有资金来源且颁布可能性很高。我们的高频估计表明，赤字/GDP一次性增加1个百分点，会使10年期名义收益率增加0.75个基点。对于赤字的持续性冲击，这一效应相当于收益率增加6.75个基点。投资者利用这些成本发布来了解美国的财政立场。在一个包含学习的模型中，我们发现投资者将成本发布中赤字新闻的很大一部分归因于政策参数的修正，并且总赤字影响的57%预计是没有资金支持的。

33603.title: Robots and Crime
33603.authors: Yang Liang, Joseph J. Sabia, Dhaval M. Dave
33603.abstract: Leveraging county-level variation in exposure to industry-specific foreign-based robotics shocks, this study is the first to explore the relationship between U.S. robotics expansions and crime. Instrumental variables estimates show that a 10 percent increase in robotics exposure led to a 0.2 to 0.3 percent increase in property crime arrests. In contrast, we find little evidence of a relationship between robotics expansions and violent crime. Our estimates are consistent with robotics-induced declines in employment and earnings among low-skilled manufacturing workers. A back-of-the-envelope calculation suggests that during the period over which robotics exposure induced adverse employment effects, such exposure generated approximately $\$322$ million (2024$) in additional crime costs nationally.
33603.zh_abstract: 利用县级层面在特定行业外国机器人冲击暴露程度上的差异，本研究首次探讨了美国机器人扩张与犯罪之间的关系。工具变量估计显示，机器人暴露程度每增加10%，会导致财产犯罪逮捕率增加0.2%至0.3%。相比之下，我们几乎没有发现机器人扩张与暴力犯罪之间存在关系的证据。我们的估计与机器人扩张导致低技能制造业工人就业和收入下降的情况一致。一项粗略计算表明，在机器人暴露导致不利就业影响的时期内，这种暴露在全国范围内产生了约3.22亿美元（2024年美元）的额外犯罪成本。
33603.meta: Programs：DAE, EH, ITI, LE, LS, PR；JEL：D24, J20, K42

33602.title: How Much Should We Spend to Reduce A.I.'s Existential Risk?
33602.zh_title: 我们应该花费多少来降低人工智能的生存风险？
33602.abstract: During the Covid-19 pandemic, the United States effectively “spent” about 4 percent of GDP — via reduced economic activity — to address a mortality risk of roughly 0.3 percent. Many experts believe that catastrophic risks from advanced A.I. over the next decade are at least this large, suggesting that a comparable mitigation investment could be worthwhile. Existing lives are valued by policymakers at around $\$10$ million each in the United States. To avoid a 1% mortality risk, this value implies a willingness to pay of $\$100,000$ per person — more than 100% of per capita GDP. If the risk is realized over the next two decades, an annual investment of 5% of GDP toward mitigating catastrophic risk could be justified, depending on the effectiveness of such investment. This back-of-the-envelope intuition is supported by the model developed here. In the model, for most of the scenarios and parameter combinations considered, spending at least 1% of GDP annually to mitigate AI risk can be justified even without placing any value on the welfare of future generations.
33602.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫情期间，美国实际上“花费”了大约4%的GDP——通过减少经济活动——来应对大约0.3%的死亡风险。许多专家认为，未来十年来自高级人工智能的灾难性风险至少与此相当，这表明类似的缓解投资可能是值得的。在美国，政策制定者对现有生命的估值约为每人1000万美元。为了避免1%的死亡风险，这个价值意味着每人愿意支付10万美元——超过人均GDP的100%。如果风险在未来二十年内显现，那么每年将GDP的5%用于缓解灾难性风险的投资可能是合理的，具体取决于此类投资的有效性。这种粗略计算的直觉得到了本文所开发模型的支持。在该模型中，对于所考虑的大多数情景和参数组合，即使不考虑未来世代的福利，每年至少花费GDP的1%来缓解人工智能风险也是合理的。

33601.title: Profitability Retrospective: What Have We Learned?
33601.zh_title: 盈利能力回顾：我们学到了什么？
33601.abstract: A lot! Profitability subsumes all of “quality” investing, explaining both the performance of the strategies that industry markets and the factors that academics employ. It also has striking power pricing “defensive equity” strategies that overweight low-beta or low-volatility stocks. Profitability tilts explain all the abnormal performance of popular “alternative value” strategies, including those adjusted for “intangibles,” and half of value's post-2007 underperformance. Profitability is crucial for pricing a wide array of seemingly unrelated anomalies, yielding a more parsimonious understanding of the cross section of expected returns.
33601.zh_abstract: 很多！盈利能力涵盖了所有的“质量”投资，既解释了行业市场推广策略的表现，也解释了学术界使用的因子。它在定价超配低贝塔或低波动率股票的“防御性股票”策略方面也具有显著能力。盈利能力倾斜解释了流行的“另类价值”策略（包括那些针对“无形资产”进行调整的策略）的所有异常表现，以及价值策略在2007年后表现不佳的一半原因。盈利能力对于定价一系列看似不相关的异象至关重要，从而对预期收益的横截面提供了更简洁的理解。

33600.title: The Long Shadow of Early Education: Evidence from a Natural Experiment in the Philippines
33600.zh_title: 早期教育的长期影响：来自菲律宾自然实验的证据
33600.abstract: How does early educational quality affect longer-term academic outcomes? We shed light on this question via a natural experiment in the Philippines—the implementation of a mother tongue education policy in public schools in kindergarten to Grade 3. This policy led to an unexpected decline in educational quality, but differentially in a subset of schools strongly predicted by pre-policy student language composition. We use language composition variables as instrumental variables for treatment. Leveraging panel data and confirming robustness to pre-trends, we find that the policy led to declines in standardized test scores in public primary schools. Employing a triple-difference strategy with Philippine Census data (across cohorts, localities, and decadal censuses), we show that by 2020, cohorts fully exposed to the policy completed 0.3 fewer years of schooling. By revealing how a policy-induced reduction in early education quality reduces educational attainment in later years, our results underscore the importance of investing in the quality of education in the first years of schooling.
33600.zh_abstract: 早期教育质量如何影响长期的学业成果？我们通过菲律宾的一个自然实验来阐明这个问题——在公立学校的幼儿园到三年级实施母语教育政策。这项政策导致了教育质量的意外下降，但在一个由政策前学生语言构成强烈预测的学校子集中存在差异。我们使用语言构成变量作为处理变量的工具变量。利用面板数据并确认对事前趋势的稳健性，我们发现该政策导致公立小学标准化考试成绩下降。采用三重差分策略（跨队列、跨地区、跨十年人口普查）分析菲律宾人口普查数据，我们表明，到2020年，完全受该政策影响的队列完成的 schooling 年限减少了0.3年。通过揭示政策导致的早期教育质量下降如何减少后期的教育成就，我们的结果强调了在最初几年的教育质量上进行投资的重要性。

33633.title: Private Benefits from Public Investment in Climate Adaptation and Resilience
33633.zh_title: 气候适应与韧性公共投资的私人收益
33633.authors: Jacob T. Bradt, Joseph E. Aldy
33633.abstract: Flood protection infrastructure investments, such as Army Corps of Engineers levees, can enhance resilience to flood risks amplified by climate change. We estimate levees’ benefits by exploiting repeat residential property transactions. In areas protected by levees, home values increase 3-4 percent. Levees impose adverse spillover flood risks that reduce home values in nearby areas by 1-5 percent. Capitalized benefits in protected areas are progressive, but adverse spillover impacts are regressive. Capitalized benefits at levee construction do not vary by race, but racial sorting occurs post-construction. The local political economy of levee construction can explain the distribution of winners and losers.
33633.zh_abstract: 防洪基础设施投资，例如陆军工程兵团的堤坝，可以增强对因气候变化而加剧的洪水风险的抵御能力。我们通过利用重复的住宅房地产交易来估算堤坝的收益。在受堤坝保护的地区，房屋价值上涨了3%至4%。堤坝会带来不利的溢出性洪水风险，使附近地区的房屋价值降低1%至5%。受保护地区的资本化收益是累进性的，但不利的溢出影响是累退性的。堤坝建设时的资本化收益不因种族而异，但建设后会出现种族分选。堤坝建设的地方政治经济学可以解释赢家和输家的分布。

33632.title: Investing in Children to Address the Child Mental Health Crisis
33632.zh_title: 投资儿童以应对儿童心理健康危机
33632.abstract: The child mental health crisis has been described as the “defining public health crisis of our time.” This article addresses three myths about the crisis: (i) the idea that the crisis is new; (ii) the belief that increases in youth suicide mainly reflect deterioration in children’s underlying mental health; and (iii) the myth that investments in children have little impact on children’s mental health. In fact, the crisis has existed for decades, youth suicides vary asynchronously with other mental health measures and are impacted by external factors such as firearms legislation, and investments can improve child mental health and prevent suicide.
33632.zh_abstract: 儿童心理健康危机被描述为“我们这个时代决定性的公共卫生危机”。本文探讨了关于该危机的三个迷思：(i) 认为危机是新出现的观点；(ii) 认为青少年自杀率上升主要反映了儿童潜在心理健康状况恶化的信念；以及 (iii) 认为对儿童的投资对儿童心理健康影响甚微的迷思。事实上，这场危机已存在数十年，青少年自杀率与其他心理健康指标呈非同步变化，并受到枪支立法等外部因素的影响，而且投资可以改善儿童心理健康并预防自杀。

33631.title: Where Have All the Good Jobs Gone? Changes in the Geography of Work in the US, 1980-2021
33631.zh_title: 好工作都去哪儿了？美国工作地理分布的变化，1980-2021
33631.abstract: We examine changes in the spatial distribution of good jobs across US commuting zones over 1980-2000 and 2000-2021. We define good jobs as those in industries in which full-time workers attain high wages, accounting for individual and regional characteristics. The share of good jobs in manufacturing has plummeted; for college graduates, good jobs have shifted to (mostly tradable) business, professional, and IT services, while for those without a BA they have shifted to (non-tradable) construction. There is strong persistence in where good jobs are located. Over the last four decades, places with larger concentrations of good job industries have tended to hold onto them, consistent with a model of proportional growth. Turning to regional specialization in good job industries, we find evidence of mean reversion. Commuting zones with larger initial concentrations of good jobs have thus seen even faster growth in lower-wage (and mostly non-tradable) services. Changing regional employment patterns are most pronounced among racial minorities and the foreign-born, who are relatively concentrated in fast growing cities of the South and West. Therefore, good job regions today look vastly different than in 1980: they are more centered around human-capital-intensive tradable services, are surrounded by larger concentrations of low-wage, non-tradable industries, and are more demographically diverse.
33631.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1980-2000年和2000-2021年间美国通勤区好工作空间分布的变化。我们将好工作定义为那些全职工作者在考虑个人和地区特征后能获得高工资的行业。制造业中好工作的份额急剧下降；对于大学毕业生而言，好工作已转向（主要是可贸易的）商业、专业和IT服务业，而对于没有学士学位的人来说，好工作则转向了（不可贸易的）建筑业。好工作所在地点具有很强的持续性。在过去四十年中，好工作行业集中度较高的地区倾向于保持这种集中度，这与比例增长模型一致。转向好工作行业的区域专业化，我们发现了均值回归的证据。因此，最初好工作集中度较高的通勤区，其低工资（且大多不可贸易）服务业增长更快。不断变化的区域就业模式在少数族裔和外国出生者中最为明显，他们相对集中在南部和西部快速发展的城市。因此，今天的好工作区域与1980年相比大相径庭：它们更集中于人力资本密集型可贸易服务业，周围是更集中的低工资、不可贸易行业，并且在人口结构上更加多样化。

33630.title: Experiments: Why, How, and A Users Guide for Producers as well as Consumers
33630.zh_title: 实验：为何、如何，以及为生产者和消费者提供的用户指南
33630.abstract: This chapter is intended as an introduction to laboratory experiments, when to use, how to evaluate them, why they matter and what are the pitfalls when designing them. I hope that users as well as consumers will find Sections that broaden their views. I start with when an economist might want to run an experiment. I then discuss basic lessons when designing experiments. I introduce a language to start a systematic description of tools we have when designing experiments to show the importance or role of a new model or force in explaining behavior. The penultimate chapter provides an advanced toolkit for running experiments. I end this chapter with my views on pre-registration, pre-analysis plans and the need for replications, robustness tests and extensions.
33630.zh_abstract: 本章旨在作为实验室实验的导论，介绍何时使用、如何评估、为何重要以及设计时的陷阱。我希望用户和消费者都能找到拓宽视野的章节。我首先从经济学家何时可能想要进行实验开始。然后讨论设计实验时的基本经验教训。我引入一种语言，开始系统描述我们在设计实验时拥有的工具，以展示新模型或力量在解释行为中的重要性或作用。倒数第二章提供了进行实验的高级工具包。我以对预注册、预分析计划以及复制、稳健性检验和扩展需求的看法结束本章。

33629.title: Class Disparities and Discrimination in Traffic Stops and Searches
33629.zh_title: 交通拦截与搜查中的阶级差异与歧视
33629.abstract: We examine class disparities and discrimination in police searches and stops using data on traffic stops conducted by Texas Highway Patrol. Low-income motorists are more likely to be searched for contraband, less likely to be found with contraband when searched, and more likely to be stopped for infractions associated with pretext stops. We measure class-based discrimination in searches per potential stop, accounting for both the search and stop margins. Our research design leverages motorists stopped in multiple vehicles conveying different class signals. Motorists are more likely to be searched when stopped in a low-status vehicle, and evidence suggests that they are also more likely to be stopped when driving one. Marginal searches triggered by vehicle status are also less likely to yield contraband when the motorist is low-income. We argue that lower hassle costs associated with arrests of low-income motorists help explain trooper behavior.
33629.zh_abstract: 我们利用德克萨斯州公路巡逻队进行的交通拦截数据，研究了警察搜查和拦截中的阶级差异与歧视。低收入驾驶者更有可能因违禁品被搜查，被搜查时发现违禁品的可能性更低，并且更有可能因与借口拦截相关的违规行为而被拦停。我们衡量了每次潜在拦截中搜查方面的基于阶级的歧视，同时考虑了搜查和拦截两个环节。我们的研究设计利用了驾驶者在传达不同阶级信号的多辆车辆中被拦停的情况。驾驶者在驾驶低地位车辆时更有可能被搜查，并且有证据表明他们在驾驶此类车辆时也更有可能被拦停。由车辆地位引发的边际搜查在驾驶者低收入时发现违禁品的可能性也更低。我们认为，与逮捕低收入驾驶者相关的较低麻烦成本有助于解释巡警的行为。

33628.title: Hotelling Meets Keynes: Aggregate Adjustment with Spatial Competition and Nominal Rigidity
33628.zh_title: 霍特林遇见凯恩斯：空间竞争与名义刚性下的总量调整
33628.abstract: This paper embeds a circular Hotelling model of spatial competition into a new-Keynesian model with staggered price setting. The resulting framework provides microfoundations for a cost-push shock, taking the form of random variations in transportation costs. An increase in transportation costs raises price markups and is contractionary and inflationary. Spatial frictions also have consequences for the propagation of aggregate demand disturbances (including monetary shocks), as they dampen their output effects and amplify their inflationary effects. Empirically, the paper shows that the cost of time spent shopping represents a significant fraction of consumption expenditure, suggesting that spatial frictions broadly defined are a nonnegligible feature of aggregate demand.
33628.zh_abstract: 本文将空间竞争的环形霍特林模型嵌入到具有交错价格设定的新凯恩斯模型中。由此产生的框架为成本推动冲击提供了微观基础，其形式是运输成本的随机变化。运输成本的增加会提高价格加成，并导致经济收缩和通货膨胀。空间摩擦还对总需求扰动（包括货币冲击）的传导产生影响，因为它们削弱了这些扰动的产出效应并放大了其通胀效应。实证上，本文表明购物所花费的时间成本占消费支出的很大一部分，这表明广义上的空间摩擦是总需求的一个不可忽视的特征。

33627.title: Indirect Cost Recovery in U.S. Innovation Policy: History, Evidence, and Avenues for Reform
33627.zh_title: 美国创新政策中的间接成本回收：历史、证据与改革路径
33627.authors: Pierre Azoulay, Daniel P. Gross, Bhaven N. Sampat
33627.abstract: The U.S. government has funded university research for nearly 80 years, with a significant share of this funding supporting the fixed costs of science through indirect cost recovery (ICR). We explain the history, objectives, and mechanics of ICR policy and review key controversies. We also provide new empirical evidence on indirect costs at the NIH, a major target of past and present ICR reform. Using data from over 350 institutions, we find that while negotiated ICR rates average 58%, effective rates—what NIH actually pays—average 42%, with relatively little variation across institutions or over time. Our analyses also suggest that a proposed 15% at rate would significantly cut NIH funding for many grantees, disproportionately affecting institutions most linked to commercial patenting and drug development. We conclude by assessing the current system, and major reform proposals, across several ICR policy objectives: support for research and infrastructure, cost-efficiency incentives, implementation costs, and transparency. No single approach dominates on all dimensions.
33627.zh_abstract: 美国政府资助大学研究已有近80年历史，其中很大一部分资金通过间接成本回收（ICR）来支持科学的固定成本。我们解释了ICR政策的历史、目标和机制，并回顾了主要争议。我们还提供了关于NIH间接成本的新实证证据，NIH是过去和现在ICR改革的主要目标。利用来自350多个机构的数据，我们发现，虽然协商的ICR费率平均为58%，但实际费率——NIH实际支付的费率——平均为42%，各机构之间或随时间推移的变化相对较小。我们的分析还表明，提议的15%统一费率将大幅削减许多受资助者的NIH资金，对与商业专利和药物开发联系最紧密的机构影响尤为严重。最后，我们根据ICR政策的几个目标——支持研究和基础设施、成本效率激励、实施成本和透明度——评估了当前系统和主要改革提案。没有一种方法在所有维度上都占主导地位。
33627.meta: Programs：EH, PE, POL, PR；JEL：H51, O31, O32, O38

33626.title: Revolving Door Laws and Political Selection
33626.zh_title: 旋转门法律与政治选拔
33626.authors: Raymond Fisman, Jetson Leder-Luis, Catherine M. O'Donnell, Silvia Vannutelli
33626.abstract: Revolving door laws restrict public officials from representing private interests before government after leaving office. While these laws mitigate potential conflicts of interest, they also may affect the pool of candidates for public positions by lowering the financial benefits of holding office. We study the consequences of revolving door laws for political selection in U.S. state legislatures, exploiting the staggered roll-out of laws across states over time. We find that fewer new candidates enter politics in treated states and that incumbent legislators are less likely to leave office, leading to an increase in uncontested elections. The decline in entry is particularly strong for independent and more moderate candidates, which may increase polarization. We provide a model of politician career incentives to interpret the results.
33626.zh_abstract: 旋转门法律限制公职人员在离职后代表私人利益与政府打交道。虽然这些法律减轻了潜在的利益冲突，但它们也可能通过降低担任公职的经济利益来影响公职候选人的储备。我们利用各州法律在不同时间交错推出的情况，研究了旋转门法律对美国州议会政治选拔的影响。我们发现，在受法律影响的州，进入政界的新候选人减少，现任议员离职的可能性降低，导致无竞争选举增加。候选人进入的减少在独立和更温和的候选人中尤为明显，这可能会加剧两极分化。我们提供了一个政治家职业激励模型来解释这些结果。

33625.title: The Research Behavior of Individual Investors
33625.zh_title: 个人投资者的研究行为
33625.abstract: Browser data from an approximately representative sample of individual investors offers a detailed account of their search for information, including how much time they spend on stock research, which stocks they research, what categories of information they seek, and when they gather information relative to events and trades. The median individual investor spends approximately six minutes on research per trade on traded tickers, mostly just before the trade; the mean spends around half an hour. Individual investors spend the most time reviewing price charts, followed by analyst opinions, and exhibit little interest in traditional risk statistics. Aggregate research interest is highly correlated with stock size, and salient news and earnings announcements draw more attention. Individual investors have different research styles, and those that focus on short-term information are more likely to trade more speculative stocks.
33625.zh_abstract: 来自一个大致具有代表性的个人投资者样本的浏览器数据，详细描述了他们的信息搜索行为，包括他们在股票研究上花费的时间、他们研究的股票、他们寻求的信息类别，以及他们相对于事件和交易收集信息的时间。个人投资者中位数在每笔交易中花费大约六分钟研究交易标的，且主要就在交易之前；均值大约为半小时。个人投资者花费最多时间查看价格图表，其次是分析师意见，并且对传统风险统计指标兴趣不大。总的研究兴趣与股票规模高度相关，而突出的新闻和盈利公告会吸引更多关注。个人投资者有不同的研究风格，那些关注短期信息的人更有可能交易更具投机性的股票。
33625.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：G02, G11, G12, G4, G40, G41, G5, G50, G53

33624.title: Mechanism Design for Personalized Policy: A Field Experiment Incentivizing Exercise
33624.zh_title: 个性化政策的机制设计：一项激励锻炼的实地实验
33624.abstract: Personalizing policies can theoretically increase their effectiveness. However, personalization is difficult when individual types are unobservable and the preferences of policymakers and individuals are not aligned, which could cause individuals to misreport their type. Mechanism design offers a strategy to overcome this issue: offer an “incentive-compatible” menu of policy choices designed to induce participants to select the variant intended for their type. Using a field experiment that personalized incentives for exercise among 6,800 adults with diabetes and hypertension in urban India, we show that personalizing with an incentive-compatible choice menu substantially improves program performance, increasing the treatment effect of incentives on exercise by 80% without increasing program costs relative to a one-size-fits-all benchmark. Mechanism design achieves similar performance to personalizing with an extensive set of observable variables, but without the high data requirements or the risk that participants might manipulate their observables.
33624.zh_abstract: 个性化政策理论上可以提高其有效性。然而，当个体类型不可观察，且政策制定者和个体的偏好不一致时，个性化是困难的，这可能导致个体虚报其类型。机制设计提供了一种克服此问题的策略：提供一个“激励相容”的政策选择菜单，旨在引导参与者选择为其类型设计的变体。通过一项在印度城市中对6800名患有糖尿病和高血压的成年人进行个性化锻炼激励的实地实验，我们表明，使用激励相容的选择菜单进行个性化设计显著提高了项目绩效，与一刀切的基准相比，在不增加项目成本的情况下，将激励对锻炼的处理效应提高了80%。机制设计实现了与使用大量可观察变量进行个性化相似的绩效，但没有高数据要求或参与者可能操纵其可观察变量的风险。

33623.title: The Impact of Increased Exposure of Diversity on Suburban Students' Outcomes: An Analysis of the METCO Voluntary Desegregation Program
33623.zh_title: 增加多样性接触对郊区学生成果的影响：对METCO自愿废除种族隔离计划的分析
33623.abstract: Over sixty years following Brown vs. Board of Education, racial and socioeconomic segregation and lack of equal access to educational opportunities persist. Across the country, voluntary desegregation busing programs aim to ameliorate these imbalances and disparities. A longstanding Massachusetts program, METCO, buses K-12 students of color from Boston and Springfield, Massachusetts to 37 suburban districts that voluntarily enroll urban students. Supporters of the program argue that it prepares students to be active citizens in our multicultural society. Opponents question the value of the program and worry it may have a negative impact on suburban student outcomes. I estimate the causal effect of exposure to diversity through the METCO program by using two types of variation: difference-in-difference analysis of schools stopping and starting their METCO enrollment and two-stage least squares analysis of space availability for METCO students. Both methods rule out substantial test score, attendance, or suspension effects of having METCO peers. Classroom ability distribution and classroom suspension rates remain similar when METCO programs start and stop. There is no negative impact on college preparation, competitiveness, persistence, or graduation.
33623.zh_abstract: 在布朗诉教育委员会案六十多年后，种族和社会经济隔离以及缺乏平等的教育机会仍然存在。全国各地的自愿废除种族隔离校车计划旨在改善这些不平衡和差距。马萨诸塞州一项历史悠久的计划METCO，将来自波士顿和马萨诸塞州斯普林菲尔德的K-12有色人种学生送往37个自愿招收城市学生的郊区学区。该计划的支持者认为，它使学生为在我们的多元文化社会中成为积极公民做好准备。反对者质疑该计划的价值，并担心它可能对郊区学生的成果产生负面影响。我通过使用两种变异来估计通过METCO计划增加多样性接触的因果效应：对学校停止和开始其METCO招生的双重差分分析，以及对METCO学生可用空间的两阶段最小二乘分析。两种方法都排除了拥有METCO同学对考试成绩、出勤率或停学率的实质性影响。当METCO项目开始和停止时，课堂能力分布和课堂停学率保持相似。对大学准备、竞争力、坚持或毕业没有负面影响。

33622.title: Putting School Surveys to the Test
33622.zh_title: 将学校调查置于检验之下
33622.authors: Joshua Angrist, Peter Hull, Russell Legate-Yang, Parag A. Pathak, Christopher R. Walters
33622.abstract: School districts increasingly gauge school quality with surveys that ask about school climate and student engagement. We use data from New York City’s middle and high schools to compare the long-run predictive validity of surveys with that of conventional test score value-added models (VAMs). Our analysis leverages the New York school match, which includes an element of random assignment, to validate a wide range of school quality estimates. We contrast the predictiveness of survey- and test-based measures for school effects on consequential outcomes related to high school graduation and college enrollment. Survey data generate better predictions of school impacts on high school graduation than test scores. But school effects on advanced high school diplomas and college attainment are better predicted by test score VAMs than surveys. We quantify the practical value of test-based and survey-based school quality measures by simulating the effects of access to one or both types of information for parents. Parents interested in boosting their children’s college attainment benefit more from test score value-added than from survey data.
33622.zh_abstract: 学区越来越多地通过调查学校氛围和学生参与度来衡量学校质量。我们利用纽约市初中和高中的数据，将调查的长期预测效度与传统考试成绩增值模型（VAM）进行比较。我们的分析利用了纽约学校匹配机制（其中包含随机分配元素）来验证一系列广泛的学校质量估计值。我们对比了基于调查和基于考试的衡量指标对学校在高中毕业和大学入学相关重要结果上的影响的预测能力。调查数据在预测学校对高中毕业的影响方面优于考试成绩。但学校对高级高中文凭和大学入学成就的影响则通过考试成绩增值模型预测得比调查更好。我们通过模拟家长获取一种或两种信息类型的效果，量化了基于考试和基于调查的学校质量衡量指标的实际价值。希望提高子女大学入学成就的家长从考试成绩增值模型中获益多于从调查数据中获益。

33621.title: The Menopause "Penalty"
33621.authors: Gabriella Conti, Rita Ginja, Petra Persson, Barton Willage
33621.abstract: The motherhood penalty is well-documented, but what happens at the other end of the reproductive spectrum? Menopause—a transition often marked by debilitating physical and psychological symptoms—also entails substantial costs. Using population-wide Norwegian and Swedish data and quasi-experimental methods, we show that a menopause diagnosis leads to lasting drops in earnings and employment, alongside greater reliance on social transfers. Increasing access to menopause-related health care can help offset these losses. Our findings reveal the hidden economic toll of menopause and the potential gains from better support policies.
33621.zh_abstract: 母亲身份惩罚已有充分文献记载，但在生育谱系的另一端会发生什么？更年期——这一通常以令人衰弱的身体和心理症状为标志的过渡期——也带来了巨大的成本。利用覆盖挪威和瑞典全国范围的数据以及准实验方法，我们表明，更年期诊断会导致收入和就业的持续下降，同时增加对社会转移支付的依赖。增加获得更年期相关医疗保健的机会有助于抵消这些损失。我们的研究结果揭示了更年期隐藏的经济代价，以及更好的支持政策可能带来的潜在收益。

33620.title: Choosing Wisely: Evaluating Latent Factor Models in the Presence of a Contaminated Instrumental Variable with Varying Strength
33620.zh_title: 明智选择：在存在污染且强度变化的工具变量时评估潜在因子模型
33620.authors: Souvik Banerjee, Anirban Basu, Shubham Das
33620.abstract: Causal inference methods are widely used in empirical research; however, there is a paucity of evidence on the properties of shared latent factor estimators in the presence of contaminated instrumental variable (IV) when a strong IV may not be available. We present a theoretical formulation to depict how the strength and degree of contamination of the IV simultaneously determine the optimal choice of estimator. We perform Monte Carlo simulations with four outcome variables and an endogenous treatment variable, with sample sizes of 1000 and 2000, and for 1000 iterations, to compare the finite sample properties of the OLS, 2SLS, Shared Latent Factor without IV (SLF), and Shared Latent Factor with IV (SLF+IV) estimators. Finally, we demonstrate the applicability of the proposed estimators to study the causal impact of maternal parity on various maternal and child health indicators: child’s height-for-age percentile, child’s weight-for-age percentile, child’s haemoglobin count, and mother’s haemoglobin count, using data from the 2019-21 Round 5 of the National Family Health Survey (NFHS-5) from India. Our simulation results indicate that for a given degree of contamination of the IV, there exists a threshold strength of the IV, such that the SLF+IV estimator has a lower (greater) bias than the SLF estimator when the strength of the IV lies above (below) that threshold. The empirical results suggest that a lower parity is associated with higher height-for-age and weight-for-age percentile and haemoglobin count in children and a higher haemoglobin count in mothers.
33620.zh_abstract: 因果推断方法广泛应用于实证研究；然而，关于在存在污染的工具变量（IV）且可能无法获得强IV时，共享潜在因子估计量性质的研究证据匮乏。我们提出了一个理论公式来描述IV的强度和污染程度如何同时决定估计量的最优选择。我们使用四个结果变量和一个内生处理变量，样本量为1000和2000，进行1000次迭代的蒙特卡洛模拟，以比较OLS、2SLS、无IV的共享潜在因子（SLF）和有IV的共享潜在因子（SLF+IV）估计量的有限样本性质。最后，我们利用印度2019-21年第五轮全国家庭健康调查（NFHS-5）的数据，展示了所提出的估计量在研究母亲生育次数对各种母婴健康指标（儿童年龄别身高百分位数、儿童年龄别体重百分位数、儿童血红蛋白计数和母亲血红蛋白计数）的因果影响方面的适用性。我们的模拟结果表明，对于给定的IV污染程度，存在一个IV强度阈值，使得当IV强度高于（低于）该阈值时，SLF+IV估计量的偏差低于（高于）SLF估计量。实证结果表明，较低的生育次数与儿童更高的年龄别身高百分位数、年龄别体重百分位数和血红蛋白计数，以及母亲更高的血红蛋白计数相关。
33620.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH, TWP；JEL：C3, C31, I1, J13

33619.title: A Geospatial Approach to Measuring Economic Activity
33619.zh_title: 一种衡量经济活动的空间地理方法
33619.authors: Anton Yang, Jianwei Ai, Costas Arkolakis
33619.abstract: We introduce a new methodology to detect and measure economic activity using geospatial data and apply it to steel production, a major industrial pollution source worldwide. Combining plant output data with geospatial data, such as ambient air pollutants, nighttime lights, and temperature, we train machine learning models to predict plant locations and output. We identify about 40% (70%) of plants missing from the training sample within a 1 km (5 km) radius and achieve R² above 0.8 for output prediction at a 1 km grid and at the plant level, as well as for both regional and time series validations. Our approach can be adapted to other industries and regions, and used by policymakers and researchers to track and measure industrial activity in near real time.
33619.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一种利用空间地理数据检测和衡量经济活动的新方法，并将其应用于钢铁生产——全球主要的工业污染源之一。我们将工厂产出数据与空间地理数据（如环境空气污染物、夜间灯光和温度）相结合，训练机器学习模型来预测工厂位置和产出。我们在1公里（5公里）半径内识别出训练样本中缺失的约40%（70%）的工厂，并在1公里网格和工厂层面的产出预测，以及区域和时间序列验证中实现了超过0.8的R²。我们的方法可以适应其他行业和地区，并被政策制定者和研究人员用于近乎实时地追踪和衡量工业活动。

33618.title: Credit Card Entrepreneurs
33618.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Raman Singh Chhina, Seyit M. Cilasun, Javier Miranda, Nicolas Serrano-Velarde
33618.abstract: Beginning in January 2021, over less than two years, credit card usage by small U.S. businesses nearly doubled, interest payments rose by 60%, and delinquencies reached 2.8%. In this paper, we utilize near real-time QuickBooks data from over 1.6 million small businesses and a targeted survey to highlight the critical role that credit card financing plays in small business activity. We find, first, monthly credit card payments were up to three times higher than loan payments during this time. Second, we use targeted surveys of these small businesses to establish credit cards as a key financing source in response to firm-level shocks, such as uncertain cash flows and overdue invoices. Third, we highlight the critical role of credit cards as a key financial transmission mechanism. Following the Federal Reserve’s rate hikes in early 2022, banks cut credit card supply, leading to a 15.75% drop in balances and a 10% decline in revenue growth, as well as a 1.5% decrease in employment growth among U.S. small businesses. These higher rates also rendered interest payments unsustainable for many, contributing to half of the observed increase in delinquencies. Lastly, a simple heterogeneous firm model with a cash-in-hand constraint illustrates the significant macroeconomic impact of credit card financing on small business activity.
33618.zh_abstract: 从2021年1月开始，在不到两年的时间里，美国小企业的信用卡使用量几乎翻了一番，利息支付增加了60%，拖欠率达到了2.8%。在本文中，我们利用来自超过160万家小企业的近乎实时的QuickBooks数据和一项针对性调查，强调了信用卡融资在小企业活动中发挥的关键作用。我们发现，首先，在此期间，每月的信用卡支付额高达贷款支付额的三倍。其次，我们通过对这些小企业的针对性调查，确定信用卡是应对企业层面冲击（如不确定的现金流和逾期发票）的关键融资来源。第三，我们强调了信用卡作为关键金融传导机制的重要作用。在美联储于2022年初加息后，银行削减了信用卡供应，导致美国小企业的余额下降15.75%，收入增长下降10%，以及就业增长下降1.5%。这些更高的利率也使许多企业的利息支付变得不可持续，导致了观察到的拖欠率上升的一半。最后，一个带有现金约束的简单异质性企业模型说明了信用卡融资对小企业活动的显著宏观经济影响。

33617.title: Subscriptions to Prescriptions: Lessons from Louisiana’s Effort to Eliminate Hepatitis C
33617.zh_title: 从订阅到处方：路易斯安那州消除丙型肝炎努力的经验教训
33617.authors: James M. Flynn, Bethany I. Lemont, Barton Willage
33617.abstract: Hepatitis C is a major public health concern due to its high rates of infection and mortality. Recent breakthroughs in pharmaceuticals not only have the potential to cure hepatitis C but could also cause large positive health externalities through reduced transmission. The high cost of these drugs under traditional reimbursement schemes create large obstacles to care, but a recent first-of-its-kind two-part tariff system in Louisiana aims to circumvent these obstacles using a modified subscription model with an exclusive pharmaceutical provider. Under this model, the medication is provided at no marginal cost to the state to cover the state's Medicaid and incarcerated population. This creates an incentive for Louisiana to aggressively test and treat as many patients as possible in order to maximize the benefits of this agreement. Using a number of different data sources, we implement synthetic control and event-study specifications, and find that detection and treatment of hepatitis C increased dramatically, with meaningful reductions in hepatitis C-related mortality and liver transplants after this agreement. Finally, after calculating the Marginal Value of Public Funds of this agreement, we find that the program more than pays for itself.
33617.zh_abstract: 丙型肝炎因其高感染率和死亡率而成为一个主要的公共卫生问题。最近的药物突破不仅有可能治愈丙型肝炎，还可能通过减少传播产生巨大的正向健康外部性。在传统报销模式下，这些药物的高成本造成了巨大的就医障碍，但路易斯安那州最近首次采用了一种两部收费制系统，旨在通过一种与独家药品供应商合作的改良订阅模式来规避这些障碍。在这种模式下，该州为其医疗补助和监狱人口提供药物，无需支付边际成本。这激励路易斯安那州积极检测和治疗尽可能多的患者，以最大化该协议的利益。利用多种不同的数据来源，我们实施了合成控制和事件研究规范，发现该协议后，丙型肝炎的检测和治疗显著增加，丙型肝炎相关死亡率和肝移植数量显著减少。最后，在计算该协议的公共资金边际价值后，我们发现该计划不仅收回了成本，而且还有盈余。

33616.title: How to Sell Public Debt in Uncertain Times
33616.zh_title: 如何在不确定时期出售公共债务
33616.authors: Harold L. Cole, Daniel Neuhann, Guillermo Ordoñez
33616.abstract: How should governments structure primary sovereign bond markets when investors face asymmetric uncertainty about default risk and total demand? Standard protocols either use uniform prices for all investors, or price discriminate based on bid prices (“pay as bid”). Uniform pricing encourages more bidding by uninformed investors but price discrimination captures inframarginal surplus. Based on this tradeoff, we analyze a potential protocol that features price discrimination on inframarginal bids and uniform pricing on marginal bids, thereby reducing the mean and variance of public borrowing costs. We also offer new evidence on the information content of primary bond markets which supports our framework.
33616.zh_abstract: 当投资者面临关于违约风险和总需求的不对称不确定性时，政府应如何构建一级主权债券市场？标准协议要么对所有投资者使用统一价格，要么根据投标价格进行价格歧视（“按投标支付”）。统一价格鼓励更多不知情投资者投标，但价格歧视则捕获了边际内剩余。基于这种权衡，我们分析了一种潜在的协议，该协议对边际内投标采用价格歧视，对边际投标采用统一价格，从而降低公共借贷成本的均值和方差。我们还提供了关于一级债券市场信息含量的新证据，这支持了我们的分析框架。

33615.title: The Rise and Fall (and Rise) of the Affordable Care Act: Varying Impacts on Coverage Over Time and Place
33615.zh_title: 《平价医疗法案》的兴衰（与复兴）：对覆盖范围随时间与地点的不同影响
33615.authors: Gabriella Aboulafia, Jonathan Gruber, Benjamin D. Sommers
33615.abstract: The Affordable Care Act (ACA) significantly expanded health insurance in the United States, but its impact has varied across time and states. We assess the law’s heterogeneous impacts over the three presidential administrations since its enactment, as well as across states with different levels of implementation of the law. We focus on Medicaid expansion and Marketplace subsidies, including the enhanced subsidies under the American Rescue Plan of 2021 (ARP). We use national household survey data and a triple-difference design – leveraging variation by time, state, and income – to identify the coverage impacts of the key components of the law. We find that 55% of ACA-related coverage gains between 2013 and 2023 came from Marketplace subsidies – about 37% from the original ACA subsidies and 19% from the ARP enhancements – while 45% were due to Medicaid, including from the "welcome mat" effect. Coverage gains differed substantially across presidential administrations, with Marketplace subsidies proving roughly 30% more effective under Presidents Obama and Biden than under President Trump. The same subsidy amount was more than twice as effective in states with their own Marketplaces than in states relying on the federal Marketplace. Our findings highlight that while the ACA’s explicit economic features drive coverage gains, their effectiveness can be substantially enhanced or hindered through federal and state implementation.
33615.zh_abstract: 《平价医疗法案》（ACA）显著扩大了美国的健康保险覆盖范围，但其影响因时间和州而异。我们评估了该法律自颁布以来在三位总统执政期间，以及在法律实施程度不同的各州之间的异质性影响。我们重点关注医疗补助扩展和Marketplace补贴，包括2021年《美国救援计划》（ARP）下的增强补贴。我们利用全国家庭调查数据和三重差分设计——利用时间、州和收入的变化——来识别该法律关键组成部分对覆盖范围的影响。我们发现，2013年至2023年间，与ACA相关的覆盖范围增长中，55%来自Marketplace补贴——约37%来自最初的ACA补贴，19%来自ARP增强补贴——而45%归因于医疗补助，包括“欢迎垫”效应。覆盖范围的增长在不同总统执政期间差异显著，在奥巴马总统和拜登总统执政期间，Marketplace补贴的有效性比特朗普总统执政期间高出约30%。相同金额的补贴在拥有自己Marketplace的州，其有效性是在依赖联邦Marketplace的州的两倍多。我们的研究结果强调，虽然ACA明确的经济特征推动了覆盖范围的增长，但其有效性可以通过联邦和州的实施得到显著增强或削弱。

33614.title: The Macroeconomic Dynamics of Labor Market Policies
33614.zh_title: 劳动力市场政策的宏观经济动态
33614.authors: Erik Hurst, Patrick J. Kehoe, Elena Pastorino, Thomas Winberry
33614.abstract: We develop a dynamic macroeconomic framework with worker heterogeneity, putty-clay adjustment frictions, and firm monopsony power to study the distributional impact of labor market policies over time. Our framework reconciles the well-known tension between low short-run and high long-run elasticities of substitution across inputs of production, especially among workers with different skills within a same education group. We use this framework to evaluate the effects of redistributive policies such as the minimum wage and the Earned Income Tax Credit. We argue that since these policies generate slow transition dynamics that can differ greatly in the short and long run, a serious assessment of their overall impact must take account of the entire time path of the responses they induce.
33614.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含工人异质性、油灰-粘土调整摩擦和企业买方垄断势力的动态宏观经济框架，以研究劳动力市场政策随时间推移的分配效应。我们的框架调和了众所周知的投入品之间（尤其是同一教育群体内不同技能工人之间）短期替代弹性低与长期替代弹性高之间的张力。我们利用该框架评估了最低工资和劳动所得税抵免等再分配政策的效果。我们认为，由于这些政策会产生缓慢的过渡动态，且其短期与长期效应可能差异巨大，因此对其整体影响的严肃评估必须考虑它们所引发的响应的整个时间路径。
33614.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：E06, E22, E24, J08, J42

33613.title: The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics’ Measurement of Telework During and Shortly After the Pandemic—an On-the-Ground Perspective
33613.zh_title: 美国劳工统计局在疫情期间及疫情后对远程工作的测量——一个实地视角
33613.authors: Anne Polivka, Mary Dorinda Allard, Emy Sok
33613.abstract: When the COVID-19 pandemic began in early 2020, the amount of telework sharply increased, allowing people to work while limiting their exposure to others. At that time, there were no regular monthly economic indicators measuring the prevalence of telework. Thus, the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) supplemented its monthly economic indicators to better measure the effect of the pandemic on the labor market, adding a short set of questions to the Current Population Survey (CPS) in May 2020. This set focused on the immediate labor market response to COVID-19, including one question about whether people were teleworking because of the pandemic. These questions became less relevant over time and were replaced in October 2022 by a new set of questions that focused entirely on telework—specifically, telework prior to the onset of the pandemic and current telework practices. The questions about telework prior to the pandemic were discontinued in November 2023, but the questions about current telework were permanently retained. This paper describes the development, evaluation, collection, analysis, and publication of the two sets of questions. We then compare the results of the telework metrics in the two sets, demonstrating how, although related, they measure fundamentally different concepts.
33613.zh_abstract: 当COVID-19疫情于2020年初开始时，远程工作量急剧增加，使人们能够在限制与他人接触的同时工作。当时，没有定期的月度经济指标来衡量远程工作的普遍程度。因此，美国劳工统计局（BLS）补充了其月度经济指标，以更好地衡量疫情对劳动力市场的影响，并于2020年5月在当前人口调查（CPS）中增加了一组简短的问题。这组问题侧重于劳动力市场对COVID-19的即时反应，其中包括一个关于人们是否因疫情而远程工作的问题。随着时间的推移，这些问题变得不那么相关，并于2022年10月被一组全新的问题所取代，这组问题完全聚焦于远程工作——具体而言，是疫情爆发前的远程工作和当前的远程工作实践。关于疫情前远程工作的问题于2023年11月停止，但关于当前远程工作的问题被永久保留。本文描述了两组问题的开发、评估、收集、分析和发布过程。然后，我们比较了两组问题中远程工作指标的结果，展示了尽管它们相关，但测量的是根本不同的概念。

33612.title: Sources of Generational Persistence in the Effects of Early-Life Health Interventions
33612.zh_title: 早期生命健康干预措施代际持续性的来源
33612.authors: Sara Sofie Abrahamsson, Aline Bütikofer, Katrine V. Løken, Marianne E. Page
33612.abstract: We document that the long-run economic benefits of a low-cost early-life health intervention transmit to later generations, but only for children of exposed mothers. We provide novel evidence that the program improved mothers' marriage outcomes but had limited effects on fathers' partnering decisions. Changes in assortative mating patterns may, therefore, be an important mechanism behind program-induced intergenerational spillovers. We also show that the intervention significantly increased economic mobility across three generations, suggesting that early health interventions may be important candidates for reducing the cycle of poverty.
33612.zh_abstract: 我们记录到，一项低成本的早期生命健康干预措施的长期经济效益会传递给后代，但仅限于受干预母亲的孩子。我们提供了新的证据，表明该计划改善了母亲的婚姻结果，但对父亲的伴侣选择决策影响有限。因此，选型婚配模式的变化可能是计划引发的代际溢出效应背后的一个重要机制。我们还表明，该干预措施显著提高了跨越三代人的经济流动性，这表明早期健康干预措施可能是减少贫困循环的重要候选方案。

33611.title: Impact Investing and Worker Outcomes
33611.zh_title: 影响力投资与工人结果
33611.authors: Josh Lerner, Markus Lithell, Gordon M. Phillips
33611.abstract: Impact investors claim to distinguish themselves from traditional venture capital firms by pursuing social objectives. Whether they do so in practice is unclear. We use confidential microdata to assess worker outcomes across portfolio companies. Impact investors are more likely than other private equity firms to fund businesses in disadvantaged areas, with minority founders, and with more employee diversity. Post-funding, impact-backed firms more often hire minority, female, less-educated, and lower-earning workers. They also allocate salary increases more favorably to minorities and rank-and-file workers. Our results are consistent with impact investors and their portfolio companies acting according to non-pecuniary social goals rather than impact washing.
33611.zh_abstract: 影响力投资者声称，他们通过追求社会目标来区别于传统的风险投资公司。他们在实践中是否如此尚不清楚。我们使用机密微观数据来评估投资组合公司中工人的结果。影响力投资者比其他私募股权公司更有可能资助位于弱势地区的企业、由少数族裔创始人创办的企业以及员工多样性更高的企业。在获得投资后，受影响力投资支持的公司更频繁地雇佣少数族裔、女性、受教育程度较低和收入较低的工人。它们还将加薪更有利地分配给少数族裔和普通员工。我们的结果与影响力投资者及其投资组合公司根据非金钱的社会目标而非“影响力洗白”行事是一致的。

33610.title: The Role of Risk and Ambiguity Preferences on Early-Childhood Investment: Evidence from Rural India
33610.zh_title: 风险与模糊偏好对早期儿童投资的作用：来自印度农村的证据
33610.authors: Michael Cuna, Lenka Fiala, Min Sok Lee, John A. List, Sutanuka Roy
33610.abstract: Understanding the role of preferences, beliefs, and constraints on social and wealth inequities is a key unlock for economic growth. This study focuses on the inter-relationship between risk and ambiguity preferences of mothers, their early childhood investments, and their children’s outcomes. To do so, we elicit ambiguity attitude and risk aversion preference parameters from more than 6000 randomly sampled mothers from nearly 500 villages in Rajasthan, India. Across several measures of mothers’ investment in nutrition of their children between the ages of 0-6, we find a robust and stable positive correlation of estimated ambiguity attitude and risk aversion parameters with maternal investments: the more risk and ambiguity averse the mother, the greater her investments. Such investments are correlated with better children’s cognitive and non-cognitive skills, as mothers with greater risk and ambiguity aversion have children with superior skills, even after accounting for socio-economic differences. Importantly, the positive effect of ambiguity and risk aversion on early-life outcomes can attenuate the negative impact of proxies of socio-economic disadvantage, such as illiteracy of the mothers, belonging to historically discriminated social groups, no exposure to radio, television, or zero access to mobile phones for all measures of cognitive and non-cognitive early-life skills.
33610.zh_abstract: 理解偏好、信念和约束对社会与财富不平等的作用是实现经济增长的关键。本研究聚焦于母亲的风险与模糊偏好、她们的早期儿童投资以及其子女结果之间的相互关系。为此，我们从印度拉贾斯坦邦近500个村庄随机抽样的6000多名母亲中，引出了模糊态度和风险厌恶偏好参数。通过母亲对其0-6岁子女营养投资的几项衡量指标，我们发现估计的模糊态度和风险厌恶参数与母亲投资之间存在稳健且稳定的正相关关系：母亲越厌恶风险和模糊，其投资就越大。这些投资与子女更好的认知和非认知技能相关，因为具有更高风险和模糊厌恶的母亲，其子女拥有更优越的技能，即使在考虑了社会经济差异之后也是如此。重要的是，模糊和风险厌恶对早期生活结果的积极影响，可以削弱社会经济劣势代理变量（如母亲文盲、属于历史上受歧视的社会群体、未接触过广播、电视或无法使用手机）对所有认知和非认知早期生活技能衡量指标的负面影响。
33610.meta: Programs：DEV, EH；JEL：D91, I14, I15, I24, J13

33609.title: Spatial Sorting and Inequality
33609.authors: Rebecca Diamond, Juan Carlos Suárez Serrato
33609.abstract: This chapter examines the role of spatial sorting in shaping economic inequality in the United States. We first document the evolution of firm and worker sorting by skill level between 1980 and 2017. We highlight a shift since 2000, where both high-education workers and firms increasingly sort away from high-wage, high-rent areas. Throughout the entire time period, high-education workers continue to sort to high amenity areas. We then develop a spatial equilibrium model that incorporates idiosyncratic worker and firm sorting and discuss estimation techniques to identify model parameters. We review recent empirical advancements in spatial sorting, including firm and worker location choices and their interactions with housing policy. We conclude by outlining the model’s limitations and proposing directions for future research.
33609.zh_abstract: 本章考察了空间分类在塑造美国经济不平等中的作用。我们首先记录了1980年至2017年间企业和工人按技能水平的分类演变。我们强调了自2000年以来的一种转变，即高学历工人和企业都越来越多地远离高工资、高租金地区进行分类。在整个时间段内，高学历工人持续向高便利设施地区分类。然后，我们构建了一个包含异质性工人和企业分类的空间均衡模型，并讨论了识别模型参数的估计技术。我们回顾了空间分类领域的最新实证进展，包括企业和工人的区位选择及其与住房政策的相互作用。最后，我们概述了该模型的局限性，并提出了未来研究的方向。

33608.title: The Inverted U-Shaped Relationship between Female Entrepreneurship and Economic Development
33608.zh_title: 女性创业与经济发展之间的倒U型关系
33608.authors: Nava Ashraf, Alexia Delfino, Edward L. Glaeser, Irene Solmone
33608.abstract: In the World Bank Enterprise Survey, the share of entrepreneurs who are women first rises and then falls with national income, which reverses the well-known U-shaped relationship between female labor force participation and economic development. This paper presents a model of entrepreneurship in which women face disadvantages, including discrimination from workers and household demands on their time, that deter firm formation in the poorest countries. In richer countries, these forces mean that women are less likely to start more complex organizations. In the model, women face the most level playing field in middle-income countries, where the returns to entrepreneurship are high enough to offset gender-based costs and both sexes typically form simple forms. We document three facts that are compatible with the model: male-owned firms are typically much larger than female-owned firms, large firms yield far higher revenues per employee and female-owned firms are more usually in industries with low levels of skilled workers. Despite the entrepreneurship rate’s reversal of the U-shaped link between female labor-force-participation and economic development, female labor-force-participation and the entrepreneurship rate are highly correlated across countries. The female entrepreneurship rate is also strongly associated with female education, weak kinship ties and Buddhism.
33608.zh_abstract: 在世界银行企业调查中，女性企业家所占比例随国民收入先上升后下降，这逆转了众所周知的女性劳动参与率与经济发展之间的U型关系。本文提出了一个创业模型，在该模型中，女性面临不利因素，包括来自工人的歧视和家庭对其时间的要求，这些因素在最贫穷的国家阻碍了企业的形成。在较富裕的国家，这些力量意味着女性不太可能创办更复杂的组织。在该模型中，女性在中等收入国家面临最公平的竞争环境，在这些国家，创业的回报足以抵消基于性别的成本，并且两性通常都创办简单的企业形式。我们记录了三个与模型相符的事实：男性拥有的企业通常比女性拥有的企业大得多；大型企业每位员工的收入要高得多；女性拥有的企业更常见于技能工人水平较低的行业。尽管创业率逆转了女性劳动参与率与经济发展之间的U型关系，但各国的女性劳动参与率与创业率高度相关。女性创业率还与女性教育、薄弱的亲属关系纽带以及佛教密切相关。
33608.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：J70, L26, O14

33666.title: The Political Consequences of Controversial Education Reform: Lessons from Wisconsin’s Act 10
33666.zh_title: 有争议的教育改革的政治后果：威斯康星州第10号法案的教训
33666.abstract: Public service reforms often provoke political backlash. Can they also yield political benefits for the politicians who champion them? We study a Wisconsin law that weakened teachers’ unions and liberalized pay, prompting mass protests. Exploiting its staggered implementation across school districts, we find that the reform cut union revenues, raised student test scores, and increased pay for some teachers. Exposure to the law increased the incumbent governor’s vote share by about 20% of his margin of victory and reduced campaign contributions to his opponent. Gains were larger in districts with stronger unions ex ante and in those where more voters benefited from the reform. Our findings highlight how even politically risky reforms can generate electoral benefits under the right circumstances.
33666.zh_abstract: 公共服务改革常常引发政治反弹。它们能否也为倡导改革的政客带来政治利益？我们研究了一项威斯康星州的法律，该法律削弱了教师工会并放开了薪酬，引发了大规模抗议。利用该法律在各学区分阶段实施的特点，我们发现这项改革削减了工会收入，提高了学生考试成绩，并增加了部分教师的薪酬。接触该法律使现任州长的得票率增加了约其胜选差额的20%，并减少了对其对手的竞选捐款。在工会原先实力更强的学区和更多选民从改革中受益的学区，收益更大。我们的发现突显了即使在政治上有风险的改革，在适当条件下也能产生选举收益。
33666.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：I20, J31, J45, P11, P46

33664.title: Taxes on Lifetime Income: A Good Idea?
33664.zh_title: 对终生收入征税：一个好主意？
33664.abstract: In standard life-cycle models, household consumption and welfare more strongly depend on lifetime income, but most countries base income taxes on current income and use progressive taxes to reduce inequality and provide social insurance. Is lifetime income a better tax base for governments seeking to provide such social insurance and redistribution? To answer this question, we build a quantitative life-cycle model of heterogeneous households with idiosyncratic wage risks and endogenous labor supply, and calibrate it to the U.S. economy. We document that switching to a lifetime income tax leads to a more efficient distribution of hours worked over time and across states of the world. This benefit rises with tax progressivity under a lifetime income tax, whereas the opposite is true under an annual income tax. Consequently, the optimal lifetime income tax is more progressive and achieves larger ex-ante welfare for a cohort of households than the optimal annual income tax.
33664.zh_abstract: 在标准的生命周期模型中，家庭消费和福利更强烈地依赖于终生收入，但大多数国家基于当前收入征收所得税，并使用累进税来减少不平等和提供社会保险。对于寻求提供此类社会保险和再分配的政府而言，终生收入是更好的税基吗？为了回答这个问题，我们构建了一个包含异质性家庭、具有特质性工资风险和内生劳动供给的定量生命周期模型，并将其校准到美国经济。我们证明，转向终生收入税会导致工作时间在时间维度和不同世界状态下更有效的分配。在终生收入税下，这种收益随着税收累进性的提高而增加，而在年度收入税下则相反。因此，最优的终生收入税比最优的年度收入税更具累进性，并且能为一代家庭实现更大的事前福利。

33663.title: Forward Selection Fama-MacBeth Regression with Higher Order Asset-Pricing Factors
33663.zh_title: 具有高阶资产定价因子的前向选择Fama-MacBeth回归
33663.authors: Nicola Borri, Denis Chetverikov, Yukun Liu, Aleh Tsyvinski
33663.abstract: We show that the higher-orders and their interactions of the common sparse linear factors can effectively subsume the factor zoo. We propose a forward selection Fama-MacBeth procedure as a method to estimate a high-dimensional stochastic discount factor model, isolating the most relevant higher-order factors. Applying this approach to terms derived from six widely used factors (the Fama-French five-factor model and the momentum factor), we show that the resulting higher-order model with only a small number of selected higher-order terms significantly outperforms traditional benchmarks both in-sample and out-of-sample. Moreover, it effectively subsumes a majority of the factors from the extensive factor zoo, suggesting that the pricing power of most zoo factors is attributable to their exposure to higher-order terms of common linear factors.
33663.zh_abstract: 我们证明，常见稀疏线性因子的高阶项及其交互项可以有效地囊括因子动物园。我们提出了一种前向选择Fama-MacBeth程序，作为估计高维随机贴现因子模型的方法，以分离出最相关的高阶因子。将这种方法应用于从六个广泛使用的因子（Fama-French五因子模型和动量因子）推导出的项，我们表明，仅包含少量选定高阶项的结果高阶模型在样本内和样本外均显著优于传统基准模型。此外，它有效地囊括了来自广泛因子动物园中的大多数因子，这表明大多数动物园因子的定价能力可归因于它们对常见线性因子高阶项的暴露。

33662.title: Measuring Human Leadership Skills with AI Agents
33662.zh_title: 用人工智能代理衡量人类领导技能
33662.authors: Ben Weidmann, Yixian Xu, David J. Deming
33662.abstract: We show that leadership skill with artificially intelligent (AI) agents predicts leadership skill with human groups. In a large pre-registered lab experiment, human leaders worked with AI agents to solve problems. Their performance on this “AI leadership test” was strongly correlated (ρ=0.81) with their causal impact as leaders of human teams, which we estimate by repeatedly randomly assigning leaders to groups of human followers and measuring team performance. Successful leaders of both humans and AI agents ask more questions and engage in more conversational turn-taking; they score higher on measures of social intelligence, fluid intelligence, and decision-making skill, but do not differ in gender, age, ethnicity or education. Our findings indicate that AI agents can be effective proxies for human participants in social experiments, which greatly simplifies the measurement of leadership and teamwork skills.
33662.zh_abstract: 我们展示了，与人工智能（AI）代理合作时的领导技能能够预测与人类群体合作时的领导技能。在一个预先注册的大型实验室实验中，人类领导者与AI代理一起解决问题。他们在这一“AI领导力测试”中的表现，与他们作为人类团队领导者所产生的因果影响高度相关（ρ=0.81），我们通过反复将领导者随机分配到人类追随者小组并衡量团队绩效来估计这种因果影响。无论是人类还是AI代理的成功领导者，都会提出更多问题，并进行更多的对话轮换；他们在社会智力、流体智力和决策技能方面的得分更高，但在性别、年龄、种族或教育程度上没有差异。我们的研究结果表明，AI代理可以成为社会实验中人类参与者的有效替代品，这极大地简化了领导力和团队合作技能的衡量。

33661.title: Credit, Land Speculation, and Low-Interest-Rate Policy
33661.zh_title: 信贷、土地投机与低利率政策
33661.abstract: This paper analyses the impact of credit expansions arising from increases in collateral values or lower interest rate policies on long-run productivity and economic growth in a two-sector endogenous growth economy with credit frictions, with the driver of growth lying in one sector (manufacturing) but not in the other (real estate). We show that it is not so much aggregate credit expansion that matters for long-run productivity and economic growth but sectoral credit expansions. Credit expansions associated mainly with relaxation of real estate financing (capital investment financing) will be productivity-and growth-retarding (enhancing). Without financial regulations, low interest rates and more expansionary monetary policy may so encourage land speculation using leverage that productive capital investment and economic growth are decreased. Unlike in standard macroeconomic models, in ours, the equilibrium price of land will be finite even if the safe rate of interest is less than the rate of output growth.
33661.zh_abstract: 本文在一个存在信贷摩擦的两部门内生增长经济体中，分析了由抵押品价值上升或低利率政策引发的信贷扩张对长期生产率和经济增长的影响，其中增长的驱动力位于一个部门（制造业）而非另一个部门（房地产）。我们表明，对长期生产率和经济增长而言，重要的并非总信贷扩张，而是部门信贷扩张。主要与房地产融资（资本投资融资）放松相关的信贷扩张将阻碍（促进）生产率和增长。在没有金融监管的情况下，低利率和更具扩张性的货币政策可能会过度鼓励利用杠杆进行土地投机，从而减少生产性资本投资和经济增长。与标准宏观经济模型不同，在我们的模型中，即使安全利率低于产出增长率，土地的均衡价格也是有限的。

33660.title: Voluntary Report of Standardized Test Scores: An Experimental Study
33660.zh_title: 标准化考试成绩的自愿报告：一项实验研究
33660.authors: Marty Haoyuan Chen, Ginger Zhe Jin
33660.abstract: The past few years have seen a shift in many universities’ admission policies from test-required to either test-optional or test-blind. This paper uses laboratory experiments to examine students’ reporting behavior given their application package and the school’s interpretation of non-reported standardized test scores. We find that voluntary disclosure is incomplete and selective, supporting both the incentive of partial unraveling (students with higher scores are more likely to report) and the incentive of reverse unraveling (students facing a more favorable school interpretation of non-reporting are less likely to report). Subjects exhibit some ability to learn about the hidden school interpretation, though their learning is imperfect. Using a structural model of student reporting behavior, we simulate the potential tradeoff between academic preparedness and diversity in a school’s admission cohort. We find that, if students have perfect information about the school’s interpretation of non-reporting, test-blind is the worst and test-required is the best in both dimensions, while test-optional lies between the two extremes. When students do not have perfect information, some test-optional policies can generate more diversity than test-required, because some students with better observable attributes may underestimate the penalty on their non-reporting. This allows the school to admit more students that have worse observable attributes but report standardized test scores. The results are robust to a variety of extensions, including when schools have access to alternative signals of academic ability and standardized test score is a noisy but sufficiently informative measure of student ability.
33660.zh_abstract: 过去几年，许多大学的招生政策已从要求考试成绩转变为考试可选或考试盲审。本文通过实验室实验，考察了学生根据其申请材料以及学校对未报告标准化考试成绩的解释所做出的报告行为。我们发现，自愿披露是不完全且具有选择性的，这既支持了部分解开的激励（分数较高的学生更有可能报告），也支持了反向解开的激励（面对学校对未报告行为更有利解释的学生报告的可能性更低）。受试者表现出一定的学习能力来了解隐藏的学校解释，尽管他们的学习并不完美。利用学生报告行为的结构模型，我们模拟了学校招生群体中学术准备与多样性之间的潜在权衡。我们发现，如果学生对学校关于未报告行为的解释拥有完全信息，那么考试盲审在两个维度上都是最差的，而要求考试成绩在两个维度上都是最好的，考试可选则介于这两个极端之间。当学生没有完全信息时，一些考试可选政策可以比要求考试政策产生更多的多样性，因为一些具有更好可观察属性的学生可能低估了对其未报告行为的惩罚。这使得学校能够录取更多可观察属性较差但报告了标准化考试成绩的学生。该结果在多种扩展情况下都是稳健的，包括当学校可以获得其他学术能力信号，且标准化考试成绩是衡量学生能力的一个有噪声但信息量足够充分的指标时。
33660.meta: Programs：ED, IO；JEL：D61, D63, D8, I23, I24

33659.title: The Effects of Eviction on Children
33659.authors: Robert Collinson, Deniz Dutz, John Eric Humphries, Nicholas S. Mader, Daniel Tannenbaum, Winnie van Dijk
33659.abstract: Eviction may be an important channel for the intergenerational transmission of poverty, and concerns about its effects on children are often raised as a rationale for tenant protection policies. We study how eviction impacts children's home environment, school engagement, educational achievement, and high school completion by assembling new data sets linking eviction court records in Chicago and New York to administrative public school records and restricted Census records. To disentangle the consequences of eviction from the effects of correlated sources of economic distress, we use a research design based on the random assignment of court cases to judges who vary in their leniency. We find that eviction increases children's residential mobility, homelessness, and likelihood of doubling up with grandparents or other adults. Eviction also disrupts school engagement, causing increased absences and school changes. While we find little impact on elementary and middle school test scores, eviction substantially reduces high school course credits. Lastly, we find that eviction reduces high school graduation and use a novel bounding method to show that this finding is not driven by differential attrition. The disruptive effects of eviction appear worse for older children and boys. Our evidence suggests that the impact of eviction on children runs through the disruption to the home environment or school engagement rather than deterioration in school or neighborhood quality, and may be moderated by access to family support networks.
33659.zh_abstract: 驱逐可能是贫困代际传递的一个重要渠道，其对儿童影响的担忧常被作为租户保护政策的理由。我们通过将芝加哥和纽约的驱逐法庭记录与行政公立学校记录及受限人口普查记录相关联，构建了新的数据集，研究了驱逐如何影响儿童的家庭环境、学校参与度、学业成就和高中毕业。为了将驱逐的后果与相关经济困境来源的影响区分开来，我们采用了一种基于案件随机分配给不同宽严程度法官的研究设计。我们发现，驱逐增加了儿童的居住流动性、无家可归的可能性以及与祖父母或其他成年人合住的概率。驱逐还扰乱了学校参与度，导致缺勤增加和转学。虽然我们发现对小学和初中考试成绩影响不大，但驱逐显著减少了高中课程学分。最后，我们发现驱逐降低了高中毕业率，并使用一种新的边界方法表明，这一发现并非由差异性流失驱动。驱逐的破坏性影响对年龄较大的儿童和男孩似乎更严重。我们的证据表明，驱逐对儿童的影响是通过对家庭环境或学校参与度的破坏，而非学校或社区质量的恶化来传导的，并且可能受到家庭支持网络可及性的调节。
33659.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I24, I30, J0, K0, R0

33658.title: Information-Concealing Credit Architecture
33658.authors: Gary B. Gorton, Ye Li, Guillermo Ordoñez
33658.abstract: When the value of a pledgeable asset (or project) is uncertain, investors are tempted to examine it. The information cost is ultimately borne by the asset owner, reducing her financing capacity. A pecking order emerges. Debt generates a greater financing capacity than equity: unlike equity investors who own the asset directly, creditors own the asset only if the borrower defaults and, therefore, have weaker incentives to acquire information. The probabilistic asset ownership can be further diluted by introducing intermediaries between the borrower and the creditor, leading to a new theory of financial intermediation and credit chains. We demonstrate that the optimal financial architecture involves systematically sequencing multiple intermediaries with heterogeneous information costs and asset correlations, rationalizing the seemingly excessive complexity of intermediated credit flows.
33658.zh_abstract: 当可质押资产（或项目）的价值不确定时，投资者有动机去检查它。信息成本最终由资产所有者承担，从而减少了她的融资能力。一种融资优序理论由此产生。债务比股权产生更大的融资能力：与直接拥有资产的股权投资者不同，债权人仅在借款人违约时才拥有资产，因此，他们有更弱的动机去获取信息。通过在借款人和债权人之间引入中介机构，这种概率性的资产所有权可以进一步被稀释，从而产生了一种关于金融中介和信贷链的新理论。我们证明了，最优的金融架构涉及系统地安排多个具有异质性信息成本和资产相关性的中介机构，这为看似过度复杂的间接信贷流动提供了合理解释。

33657.title: Leaving Money on the Table
33657.authors: Mackenzie Alston, Tatyana Deryugina, Olga Shurchkov
33657.abstract: There is much disagreement about the extent to which financial incentives motivate study participants. We elicit preferences for being paid for completing a survey, including a one-in-twenty chance of winning a $\$100$ electronic gift card, a guaranteed electronic gift card with the same expected value, and an option to refuse payment. More than twice as many participants chose the lottery as chose the guaranteed payment. Given that most people are risk averse, this pattern suggests that factors beyond risk preferences—such as hassle costs—influenced their decision-making. Almost 20 percent of participants actively refused payment, demonstrating low monetary motivation. We find both systematic and unobserved heterogeneity in the characteristics of who turned down payment. The propensity to refuse payment is more than four times as large among individuals 50 and older compared to younger individuals, suggesting a tradeoff between financially motivating participants and obtaining a representative sample. Overall, our results suggest that modest electronic gift card payments violate key requirements of Vernon Smith’s induced value theory.
33657.zh_abstract: 关于经济激励在多大程度上能激励研究参与者，存在很大分歧。我们引出了参与者对完成调查获得报酬的偏好，包括二十分之一的机会赢得100美元电子礼品卡、一张具有相同期望值的保证性电子礼品卡，以及拒绝付款的选项。选择抽奖的参与者人数是选择保证性付款的两倍多。鉴于大多数人是风险厌恶的，这种模式表明，除了风险偏好之外的因素——例如麻烦成本——影响了他们的决策。近20%的参与者主动拒绝付款，显示出低货币动机。我们发现，在拒绝付款者的特征上，存在系统性和未观测到的异质性。50岁及以上个体拒绝付款的倾向是较年轻个体的四倍多，这表明在通过经济手段激励参与者与获得代表性样本之间存在权衡。总体而言，我们的结果表明，适度的电子礼品卡付款违反了弗农·史密斯的诱导价值理论的关键要求。

33656.title: Counting the Poor: The Liquidity-Adjusted Supplemental Expenditure Poverty Measure
33656.zh_title: 贫困人口统计：流动性调整后的补充性支出贫困衡量指标
33656.authors: Sung Ah Bahk, John Fitzgerald, Robert A. Moffitt
33656.abstract: Most countries use income as a measure of available resources when calculating household-level poverty status. We introduce a new measure of poverty status to the literature which is based on household expenditure instead. We show that an expenditure-based measure is the theoretically correct measure of resources actually transferred into a given period in the life cycle because it includes spending financed by borrowing and asset drawdowns, which income does not. We also show that the illiquidity of both service flows from durables and the expenditure needed to maintain them, as well as the value of in-kind transfers received, requires an adjustment to both the poverty threshold and available resources because those flows and transfers cannot be used to satisfy any minimum consumption need other than that for a single specific good. Our expenditure-based poverty measure constitutes an internally consistent comparison of liquidity-adjusted needs to the liquid resources available to meet those needs when calculating who is poor and who is not. When applying our new poverty measure to the Consumer Expenditure Survey data from 2009 to 2022, we find expenditure poverty to be below that using income but that the relationship between the two varies strongly with where the poverty threshold is drawn. We show that the impact of tax and transfer programs on poverty using our measure differs from that using the standard approach and could yield a slight reduction in the anti-poverty impact of those programs, that the impact of adding a transportation need to the minimum bundle required to not be poor could raise the poverty rate by about two percentage points, and that our expenditure resource-based measure is lower than that yielded by a consumption measure when using a poverty threshold similar to that used by the U.S. government.
33656.zh_abstract: 大多数国家在计算家庭层面的贫困状况时，使用收入作为可用资源的衡量指标。我们向文献引入了一种基于家庭支出而非收入的新贫困状况衡量指标。我们表明，基于支出的衡量指标在理论上是衡量生命周期中实际转移到特定时期的资源的正确指标，因为它包括了通过借贷和资产消耗来融资的支出，而收入则不包括这些。我们还表明，来自耐用品的使用服务流以及维持这些服务所需的支出的非流动性，以及收到的实物转移的价值，都需要对贫困线和可用资源进行调整，因为这些流量和转移不能用于满足除单一特定商品之外的任何最低消费需求。我们的基于支出的贫困衡量指标，在计算谁贫困谁不贫困时，构成了对流动性调整后的需求与满足这些需求可用的流动性资源进行内部一致比较。当我们将新的贫困衡量指标应用于2009年至2022年的消费者支出调查数据时，我们发现支出贫困率低于使用收入衡量的贫困率，但两者之间的关系随贫困线的设定位置而强烈变化。我们表明，使用我们的衡量指标，税收和转移支付计划对贫困的影响与使用标准方法得出的结果不同，并且可能导致这些计划的反贫困效果略有降低；将交通需求添加到避免贫困所需的最低商品组合中，可能会使贫困率上升约两个百分点；并且，当使用与美国政府类似的贫困线时，我们的基于支出资源的衡量指标低于基于消费的衡量指标所得到的结果。

33655.title: Asylum Seekers and the Rise in Homelessness
33655.zh_title: 寻求庇护者与无家可归者人数的上升
33655.authors: Bruce D. Meyer, Angela Wyse, Douglas Williams
33655.abstract: Data from the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) indicate an unprecedented 43 percent increase in the number of people residing in homeless shelters in the United States between 2022 and 2024, reversing the gradual decline over the preceding sixteen years. Three-quarters of this rise was concentrated in four localities – New York City, Chicago, Massachusetts, and Denver – where large inflows of new immigrants seeking asylum were housed in emergency shelters. Using direct estimates from local government sources and indirect methods based on demographic changes, we estimate that asylum seekers accounted for about 60 percent of the two-year rise in sheltered homelessness during this period, challenging media and policy narratives that primarily attribute this rise to local economic conditions and housing affordability.
33655.zh_abstract: 来自住房和城市发展部的数据显示，2022年至2024年间，美国居住在无家可归者收容所的人数前所未有地增加了43%，扭转了此前十六年逐步下降的趋势。这一增长的75%集中在四个地区——纽约市、芝加哥、马萨诸塞州和丹佛——在这些地方，大量寻求庇护的新移民涌入并被安置在紧急收容所。利用来自地方政府来源的直接估计和基于人口变化的间接方法，我们估计在此期间，寻求庇护者约占收容所无家可归者两年增长量的60%，这挑战了主要将此增长归因于当地经济状况和住房可负担性的媒体和政策叙事。

33654.title: Failures of Contingent Reasoning in Annuitization Decisions
33654.zh_title: 年金化决策中的条件推理失败
33654.authors: Erzo F.P. Luttmer, Priscila de Oliveira, Dmitry Taubinsky
33654.abstract: This paper studies psychological biases in take-up of annuities, using an incentivized experiment with a probability-based sample (N = 3,038). Choosing an annuity was payoff-maximizing in the experiment at all prices, but take-up was incomplete and price elastic. Reformulating decisions as insurance against a “bad” outcome rather than insurance against “longevity risk” did not increase take-up. Instead, we find substantial failures of contingent reasoning: participants under-appreciated how annuitization mitigated the need for less-efficient means of saving for retirement. Increasing the salience of the interaction with savings decisions, or eliminating the need to think through this interaction altogether, substantially increased annuity take-up.
33654.zh_abstract: 本文通过一项基于概率样本（N = 3,038）的激励实验，研究了年金购买中的心理偏差。在实验中，选择年金在所有价格下都是收益最大化的，但购买率并不完全且具有价格弹性。将决策重新表述为针对“坏”结果的保险而非针对“长寿风险”的保险，并未提高购买率。相反，我们发现了严重的条件推理失败：参与者低估了年金化如何减轻对效率较低的退休储蓄方式的需求。提高与储蓄决策互动的显著性，或者完全消除思考这种互动的必要性，显著提高了年金的购买率。
33654.meta: Programs：AG, PE；JEL：D14, D15, D9, G5, J26

33652.title: Sorting to Expensive Cities
33652.abstract: We propose a spatial equilibrium model with heterogeneous households holding general non-homothetic preferences over tradable goods and housing. In equilibrium, desirable and productive locations command high housing prices. So long as housing is a necessity, these locations are disproportionately inhabited by high-income earners who are relatively less affected by high housing prices. We clarify how this source of sorting complements other potential sorting forces in spatial equilibrium models, namely, comparative advantage in production and heterogeneous preferences for locations. We show how to measure changes in welfare inequality across income groups in a theoretically-consistent way when housing is a necessity, extending the approach popular in models with homothetic preferences. We use our framework to track the evolution of welfare inequality between college and non-college graduates in the United States between 1980 and 2020. We find that, accounting for change in prices, it has risen by more than nominal wage inequality, even as college graduates increasingly sort into cities with expensive housing over this time period.
33652.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个空间均衡模型，其中包含对可贸易商品和住房持有一般非位似偏好的异质性家庭。在均衡状态下，理想且生产力高的地点会推高住房价格。只要住房是必需品，这些地点就会不成比例地被高收入者占据，他们受高房价的影响相对较小。我们阐明了这种分选来源如何与空间均衡模型中的其他潜在分选力量（即生产中的比较优势和对地点的异质性偏好）相互补充。我们展示了当住房是必需品时，如何以理论一致的方式衡量不同收入群体间福利不平等的变化，从而扩展了在位似偏好模型中流行的做法。我们利用我们的框架追踪了1980年至2020年间美国大学毕业生与非大学毕业生之间福利不平等的演变。我们发现，考虑到价格变化，福利不平等的上升幅度超过了名义工资不平等，即使在此期间大学毕业生越来越多地分选到住房昂贵的城市。

33651.title: Asset Embeddings
33651.authors: Xavier Gabaix, Ralph S. J. Koijen, Robert J. Richmond, Motohiro Yogo
33651.abstract: Firm characteristics, based on accounting and financial market data, are commonly used to represent firms in economics and finance. However, investors collectively use a much richer information set beyond firm characteristics, including sources of information that are not readily available to researchers. We show theoretically that portfolio holdings contain all relevant information for asset pricing, which can be recovered under empirically realistic conditions. Such guarantees do not exist for other data sources, such as accounting or text data. We build on recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) that represent unstructured data (e.g., text, audio, and images) by high-dimensional latent vectors called embeddings. Just as word embeddings leverage the document structure to represent words, asset embeddings leverage portfolio holdings to represent firms. Thus, this paper is a bridge from recent advances in AI and ML to economics and finance. We explore various methods to estimate asset embeddings, including recommender systems, shallow neural network models such as Word2Vec, and transformer models such as BERT. We evaluate the performance of these models on three benchmarks that can be evaluated using a single quarter of data: predicting relative valuations, explaining the comovement of stock returns, and predicting institutional portfolio decisions. We also estimate investor embeddings (i.e., representations of investors and their strategies), which are useful for investor classification, performance evaluation, and detecting crowded trades. We discuss other applications of asset embeddings, including generative portfolios, risk management, and stress testing. Finally, we develop a framework to give an economic narrative to a group of similar firms, by applying large language models to firm-level text data.
33651.zh_abstract: 基于会计和金融市场数据的公司特征，通常被用来在经济学和金融学中代表公司。然而，投资者集体使用的信息集远比公司特征丰富得多，包括研究人员不易获得的信息来源。我们从理论上证明，投资组合持有量包含了所有与资产定价相关的信息，这些信息可以在经验上现实的条件下被恢复。对于其他数据来源，如会计或文本数据，则不存在这样的保证。我们借鉴了人工智能和机器学习的最新进展，这些进展通过称为嵌入的高维潜在向量来表示非结构化数据（例如文本、音频和图像）。正如词嵌入利用文档结构来表示单词一样，资产嵌入利用投资组合持有量来表示公司。因此，本文是连接人工智能和机器学习最新进展与经济学和金融学的桥梁。我们探索了估计资产嵌入的各种方法，包括推荐系统、浅层神经网络模型（如Word2Vec）和Transformer模型（如BERT）。我们在三个可以使用单个季度数据评估的基准上评估了这些模型的性能：预测相对估值、解释股票收益的联动性以及预测机构投资组合决策。我们还估计了投资者嵌入（即投资者及其策略的表示），这对于投资者分类、绩效评估和检测拥挤交易非常有用。我们讨论了资产嵌入的其他应用，包括生成式投资组合、风险管理和压力测试。最后，我们开发了一个框架，通过将大型语言模型应用于公司层面的文本数据，为一组相似的公司提供经济叙事。

33650.title: AI as Strategist
33650.zh_title: 作为战略家的人工智能
33650.abstract: Can artificial intelligence (AI) function as an organisational strategist? This paper adapts the formal theory of strategy developed by van den Steen (2017, 2018a) to a two-decision framework in which the strategist may be either human or AI. The model distinguishes two channels through which strategy creates value: an expertise effect, which improves the stand-alone quality of key decisions, and a coordination effect, which aligns interdependent choices through influence or control. We compare human and AI strategists along two primitives— confidence (belief accuracy) and agreement (shared judgment)—and show how these shape the effectiveness of authority and persuasion. Our analysis reveals that credibility substitutes for control: as agreement with the strategist increases, the value of formal authority diminishes. Transparent AIs, which generate higher credibility through architectural selection, can guide effectively through influence, while opaque AIs require formal control to realise their expertise advantage. These findings highlight how AI transparency serves as a substitute for authority, yielding design implications for domain-contingent authority and progressive delegation in human–AI collaboration.
33650.zh_abstract: 人工智能能否充当组织战略家？本文将van den Steen（2017, 2018a）发展的战略形式理论适配到一个双决策框架中，其中战略家可以是人类或人工智能。该模型区分了战略创造价值的两个渠道：专业知识效应，它提高了关键决策的独立质量；以及协调效应，它通过影响或控制来调整相互依赖的选择。我们沿着两个原始维度——信心（信念准确性）和一致性（共同判断）——比较人类和人工智能战略家，并展示这些因素如何塑造权威和说服的有效性。我们的分析揭示，可信度可以替代控制：随着与战略家一致性的增加，正式权威的价值会降低。透明的AI通过架构选择产生更高的可信度，可以通过影响有效地进行指导，而不透明的AI则需要正式控制来实现其专业知识优势。这些发现凸显了AI透明度如何作为权威的替代品，为人类与AI协作中的领域权变授权和渐进式授权提供了设计启示。

33649.title: The Memory Premium
33649.authors: Yuval Salant, Jorg L. Spenkuch, David Almog
33649.abstract: We explore the role of memory for choice behavior in unfamiliar environments. Drawing on a unique data set, we document that decision-makers exhibit a “memory premium.” They tend to choose in-memory alternatives over out-of-memory ones, even when the latter are objectively better. Consistent with well-established regularities regarding the inner workings of human memory, the memory premium is associative, subject to interference and repetition effects, and decays over time. Evidence from a laboratory experiment implies that the memory premium arises because individuals rely on their memory to identify alternatives that warrant careful consideration, albeit in a boundedly rational way.
33649.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了记忆在不熟悉环境中的选择行为中的作用。利用一个独特的数据集，我们记录了决策者表现出一种“记忆溢价”。他们倾向于选择记忆中的选项而非记忆之外的选项，即使后者客观上更好。与关于人类记忆内部运作的既定规律一致，记忆溢价是联想性的，受到干扰和重复效应的影响，并且会随时间衰减。来自实验室实验的证据表明，记忆溢价之所以出现，是因为个体依赖他们的记忆来识别值得仔细考虑的选项，尽管是以一种有限理性的方式。

33648.title: Moral Hazard under Liquidity Constraints
33648.zh_title: 流动性约束下的道德风险
33648.authors: Keith Marzilli Ericson, Johannes G. Jaspersen, Justin R. Sydnor
33648.abstract: Spending induced by health insurance is often called moral hazard and assumed to be inefficient. We adapt standard models and show that for those living “hand-to-mouth”, the financing benefits of insurance cause a portion of moral hazard to be efficient. Although insurance’s price distortions also create some inefficient spending, the net welfare impacts of moral hazard can be positive. We present an intuitive graphical framework and formal results to distinguish moral hazard’s efficient and inefficient components. Simulations show economically significant net benefits of moral hazard in many cases for those with liquidity constraints. Our framework also provides a new way of modeling the “income effect” induced by insurance, and distinguishes it from the “liquidity effect”. While both can lead to efficient moral hazard, moral-hazard benefits from the “liquidity effect” are often substantially larger. We use our framework to revisit prior estimates of Medicaid’s value from the Oregon Health Insurance Experiment.
